name: The Minds Behind True Crime with Dr. Vona

episodes.title: Clinical Review of Lori Vallow: Cult Belief, Coercive Control, and the Psychology of Moral Collapse
episodes.description:
Welcome to 🧠 The Mind Behind the Crime with Dr. Vona – where clinical psychology meets true crime, and every case is explored with compassion, clarity, and critical thought.

I’m Dr. Jaime Vona, a research psychologist, professor, and lifelong student of human behavior. Here, we go beyond the headlines to examine the minds behind real crimes—without glorifying the criminal or exploiting the victims.

🎓 Backed by psychological expertise
🧠 Focused on personality disorders, forensic mental health, and behavioral analysis
🎥 Featuring case breakdowns, expert reactions, ethical critiques of trending true crime, and deep dives into the psychology of violence
💬 Promoting empathetic, fact-based discussion and mental health awareness
📚 Grounded in DSM-5-TR criteria, current research, and trauma-informed insight

Whether we're discussing a case like Bryan Kohberger, analyzing media portrayals, or unpacking the ethics of crime content, this space is committed to:

✅ Ethical reporting
✅ Psychological accuracy
✅ Respect for victims and survivors
✅ Elevating the true crime conversation

🚫 No clickbait. No glorification. No armchair diagnoses.
✅ Just responsible storytelling rooted in science and humanity.

If you care about truth, depth, and integrity in true crime—subscribe and join the growing community at The Mind Behind the Crime.
Let’s break down behavior and build a better narrative together.
